channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Oracle Stock Surges 5% as AI Cloud Momentum and New Utilities AI Suite Spark Investor Optimism
item.description: NEW YORK — Oracle Corp. shares climbed more than 5% in early trading Monday, reaching $145.41, as investors appeared to embrace the company's accelerating artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure growth amid a broader market recovery and fresh product… [Oracle, Intel]

item.title: Alphabet Stock Dips in Pre-Market as AI Spending and Antitrust Pressures Weigh on GOOG
item.description: NEW YORK — Alphabet Inc. Class C shares closed Friday at $315.72, unchanged on the day, but slipped in pre-market trading Monday to around $313.60, down about 0.67%, as investors weighed heavy capital spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure against… [Alphabet, Intel]
